Compass brief contract for v0.1.11 is now fail-closed against stock framing: scoped 24h and 48h must never borrow global prose, the old Executive/Product versus Operator/Technical split is forbidden across narration and rendering, and provider plus deterministic briefs both reject internal canned wrappers before refresh can publish them.
Scoped Compass is fail-closed: when a workstream scope is selected, Compass must render that exact scoped brief or an explicit scoped-unavailable state, never the global brief.
Compass voice is a product invariant: no stock framing, no house phrases, no canned status wrappers, and no warmed-cache replay of templated narration.
